title: nephrodium gongylodes
intro: Nephrodium gongylodes, also known as the Rattlesnake Fern, is a type of fern native to North America, characterized by its unique, vase-shaped fronds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium gongylodes include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and is also sometimes used in herbal remedies and supplements.
